proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +34.3pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +34.3pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +34.3pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with only 11 of 74 Bear exposures vs 63 Choppy, so activation is deferred and the existing 85.14% Choppy concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-23) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: UP_TRI × Metal: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, sector=Metal (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +27.9pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.72 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
Portfolio regime concentration in Choppy triggered at 85.14% (threshold 0.8); compounding via UP_TRI cohorts should be monitored
R-multiple 0.72 reflects D-8 Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7; cohort edge may compress if exit rule changes
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +27.9pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +27.9pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.72. The sector=Metal filter narrows rather than amplifies UP_TRI exposure (58 of 74 open) in an 85.14% Choppy-concentrated portfolio, and TAKE_SMALL sizing limits incremental concentration. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-23) with no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime = Choppy (85.1%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime = Choppy; recommended action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M or (b) regime mix rebalances below 80% Choppy via natural Day-6 exits; prefer non-Choppy or DOWN_TRI/BULL_PROXY additions to dilute directional skew.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear regime flip would invalidate the prevailing signal context for 63 of 74 open positions simultaneously, forcing correlated mark-to-market drawdown across the long-heavy book with no statistical edge to justify holding through the transition.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at 0.8514 vs 0.80 threshold (63/74 positions)
matched cohort regime=Choppy__signal_type=UP_TRI is Candidate tier (n=118) — unvalidated edge
UP_TRI signal share at 58/74 = 78.4%, reinforcing directional long skew within unvalidated regime
top cell UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 12.16% (below 20% cell threshold)
EOD bridge archive missing — exposure computed from signal_history fallback
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in regime=Choppy until either (a) Choppy×UP_TRI cohort promotes to Tier M or (b) regime mix rebalances below 80% Choppy via natural Day-6 exits; prefer non-Choppy or DOWN_TRI/BULL_PROXY additions to dilute directional skew.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bull or Choppy→Bear regime flip would invalidate the prevailing signal context for 63 of 74 open positions simultaneously, forcing correlated mark-to-market drawdown across the long-heavy book with no statistical edge to justify holding through the transition.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration triggered at 0.8514 (Choppy, above 0.80 threshold) and the matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=118) — unvalidated edge. UP_TRI dominates signal mix at 58/74 = 78.4% (below 85%) and no single cell breaches 20% (top is UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank at 12.16%), but the regime concentration alone with unvalidated cohort support warrants warn — a Choppy regime flip would unwind the entire 74-position long-heavy book simultaneously with no statistical justification.
